zh.lifeSummary: 當John Skipwith II於1351年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾貝斯比時，他的父親William Skipwith II27歲，母親Alice Hiltoft25歲。他和Alice Tilney至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1415年7月15日在英國林可爾史爾可福納姆享年64歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾可福納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Skipwith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: The main Skipwith family held the manor of Skipwith in England in the early Middle Ages, and direct descendants can be traced to the present day. In the 13th century they moved from Yorkshire to Lincolnshire, where their principal seat was at southern Ormsby. In the early 17th century there was further migration, to Leicestershire, Warwickshire, and across the Atlantic to VA. Other bearers of the name seem to have been tenants of Lincolnshire manors held by the Skipworth family, and to have taken the surname of their overlords.

variants.name: Skipworth
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Skipwith (East Yorkshire), from Old Northumbrian scīp (Old English scēap ‘sheep’), + Old English wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farm’, later replaced by Old Norse vithr ‘wood’; initial Sk-, instead of Sh-, is also due to Scandinavian influence.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Skipwith II was born in 1351, in Beesby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Skipwith II, was 27 and his mother, Alice Hiltoft, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Alice Tilney. He died on 15 July 1415, in Covenham, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Covenham, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Skipwith II est né en 1351, à Beesby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Skipwith II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Hiltoft, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Alice Tilney. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1415, à Covenham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Covenham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Skipwith II 1351 in Beesby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Skipwith II 27 und seine Mutter Alice Hiltoft 25. Er hatte mit Alice Tilney mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juli 1415 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Covenham, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Covenham, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John Skipwith IIが1351年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアビースビーで生まれた時，父William Skipwith IIは27歳，母Alice Hiltoftは25歳であった。彼はAlice Tilneyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1415年7月15日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアコベンハムで64歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアコベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Skipwith II(이)가 1351년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 브이스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Skipwith II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Hiltoft(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Alice Tilney(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 7월 15일 영국 링코실르 커븐함에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 커븐함에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Alice Tilney. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Skipwith II родился в 1351 г. в местности бисби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Skipwith II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Hiltoft, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Alice Tilney. Он умер 15 июля 1415 г. в местности ковенам, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ковенам, линколншир, Англия.
